chiba.name: Chiba City
chiba.description: A neon-lit sprawl of corporate arcologies. The Finn's territory. The air smells of ramen and ozone.

sense_net.name: Sense/Net
sense_net.description: Major media corporation. Their database holds the demo file you need.

servers.name: Demo Database
servers.description: A small server hosting the demo file. Easy run, low security.

servers.name: Mainframe Alpha
servers.description: Sense/Net's primary data center. Heavy ICE, multiple layers.

public_grid.name: Public Grid
public_grid.description: The open Matrix backbone. Anyone can jack in. Watch for stray ICE.

servers.name: Grid Hub
servers.description: A basic data hub. Good for beginners.

servers.name: Public Archive
servers.description: Old data archives. Lots of nodes, low threat.

night_city.name: Night City
night_city.description: High-tech urban hell. Harder jobs, better pay.

arasaka.name: Arasaka
arasaka.description: Japanese megacorp. Black ICE inside. Approach with caution.

servers.name: Arasaka Tower (Shallow)
servers.description: Entry-level Arasaka systems. Black ICE patrols the perimeter.
